title: anisomeris polyantha
intro: Anisomeris polyantha, also known as the Five-leaf chayotli or Desert holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Celastraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anisomeris polyantha include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Anisomeris polyantha include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to alleviate symptoms.
